title: The Paradox of American Unionism: Why Americans Like Unions More Than Canadians Do But Join Much Less. By Seymour Martin Lipset and Noah Meltz, with Rafael Gomez and Ivan Katchanovski. Cornell University Press, 2004. 226 pp. Cloth, $32.50
